results.title: Punjab Police Promotions: 15 DSPs Elevated as SPs – THE LIST
results.description: Chandigarh, July 17, 2026 (Yes Punjab News) The Punjab Government has promoted 15 Deputy Superintendents of Police (DSPs) of the Punjab Police Service (PPS) to the rank of Superintendent of Police (SP) on an officiating basis. The promotions were approved by the Department of Home Affairs and Justice following the recommendations of the Departmental Promotion Committee (DPC), which [...] The post Punjab Police Promotions: 15 DSPs Elevated as SPs – THE LIST appeared first on Yes Punjab News .

results.title: 5,069 dead as Venezuela quake toll continues to rise
results.description: Caracas, July 18 : The death toll from the June 24 earthquakes in Venezuela has risen to 5,069, National Assembly President Jorge Rodriguez said. According to an official update released on Telegram, on Friday, by Rodriguez, the number of injured remained at 16,740, while 6,462 people had been rescued. The update said 21,235 people were staying in 107 temporary camps set up in the Venezuelan capital of Caracas and the central states of La Guaira, Miranda and Aragua. Since the 7.2- and 7.5-magnitude earthquakes struck more than three weeks ago, authorities have recorded 1,331 aftershocks. Earlier, Rodriguez said 94 temporary camps have been set up so far. La Guaira, the coastal state where the two quakes caused the most damage, has 10,981 people in shelters, while Caracas has 6,133 and the central state of Miranda has 1,323, he said. Earlier, Venezuela's acting President Delcy Rodriguez expressed gratitude for the humanitarian aid provided by 28 countries to support victims of the country's recent quakes. She made the remarks after inspecting a collection centre in Caracas, where more than 2,000 tons of international aid are sorted for distribution to temporary camps housing victims of the June 24 earthquakes. "Venezuela never tires of thanking the countries, the peoples of the world, and the governments of the world that have offered a helping hand," Rodriguez said. "Each country will be able to see how its aid is being used so that the Venezuelan people feel the friendly helping hand of that country," she added. Thanks to the international response to the tragedy, Venezuela knows it is not alone, said Rodriguez. "The most important thing is to look to the future, how we are going to recover, how we are going to rebuild the affected areas." --IANS

results.title: Sneak Peek of Tonight’s Episode of Asit Modi’s TMKOC: Will Jethalal Be Able to Clear the Misunderstanding Around Gada Electronics?
results.description: Tonight on Asit Modi’s Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah, the mystery surrounding the seal on Gada Electronics takes an emotional turn. As the Gokuldham residents gather at Jethalal’s house, Champaklal learns about the shocking incident and is furious. Convinced that Jethalal must have done something wrong for the shop to be sealed, he loses his temper and begins scolding him. Also read: Archana Puran Singh Recalls Teachers Urging Her to Join IAS or IFS Before Acting Jethalal Trapped in a Big Misunderstanding Despite repeatedly trying to explain himself, Jethalal doesn’t get a chance to speak. Overwhelmed by the situation, he finds himself blamed for something he doesn’t even understand. With everyone jumping to conclusions, the misunderstanding only grows, leaving Jethalal helpless and frustrated. Read also: Actor & Producer Nikita Rawal Honoured by Varun Dhawan Will Jethalal finally get a chance to reveal the truth? How will this misunderstanding be resolved? And will the Gokuldham residents discover the real reason behind the seal on Gada Electronics? Find out tonight at 8:30 PM, only on Sony SAB. Recap of the Episode The latest episode of Asit Modi’s Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah saw the mystery surrounding the seal on Gada Electronics take a dramatic turn. Rita Reporter reached Gada Electronics and went live, claiming that the shop's seal suggested Jethalal must have done something wrong. Watching the broadcast on his phone, Jethalal was furious that conclusions were being drawn even before the truth had come to light. Also read: Pragati Srivastava talked about Prakash Jha, Anand L Rai Meanwhile, Popatlal rushed to Gada House to inform Champaklal about the shocking incident. Soon, the other Gokuldham residents gathered at Jethalal's house and watched the live news coverage together. At the shop, Nattu Kaka and Bagha tried to stop Rita Reporter from making assumptions, but she continued reporting that Jethalal had fled the scene. Ironically, Jethalal was on his way to Gada Electronics, unaware of the rumours being spread about him. As the misunderstanding deepened, Tapu repeatedly tried to reach Jethalal, but his phone remained busy. Also read: Dil Sambhalta Nahi: Shael Oswal Makes Playback Debut for Max, Min & Meowzaki Missed the Last Episode? Watch it here: FAQs Who is Asit Modi? Asit Kumarr Modi is the creator and producer of India's longest-running sitcom Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah (TMKOC). What is the current status of TMKOC? TMKOC continues ruling TRPs after 17+ years with clean comedy; new episodes air regularly on Sony SAB. Will Daya Bhabhi return to TMKOC? Asit Modi has addressed fan hopes for Disha Vakani's return as Daya, amid cast changes and rumors. Are there exit rumors for Dilip Joshi in TMKOC? Asit Modi refuted rumors of Jethalal actor Dilip Joshi's exit, confirming the show's stability. What are Asit Modi's plans for TMKOC? Plans include expanding the TMKOC universe with potential movies while maintaining family-friendly content. results.title: KSRTC employee taken into custody for sexually assaulting co-passenger in bus
results.description: ALAPPUZHA: A KSRTC employee has been taken into police custody for sexually assaulting a co-passenger on the bus in Haripad Saturday morning. He tried to sexually assault the woman, who was going to Kollam from Alappuzha.
